scripts.build: tsc src/app.ts --target ES2020 --module ES2020 --lib DOM,ES2020 --outDir dist --skipLibCheck --strict --pretty false
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build && rm -rf public && mkdir -p public/dist public/icons && cp index.html styles.css manifest.webmanifest public/ && cp icons/icon-192.png icons/icon-512.png icons/apple-touch-icon.png public/icons/ && cp dist/app.js public/dist/app.js && printf 'window.MUSIC_LINK_API_BASE = "/api";\n' > public/config.js
